ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the session is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., keynote, workshop, panel discussion) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed for the session */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration for the session is open */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration for the session closes */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL to session materials (e.g., slides, handouts) */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is featured (e.g., keynotes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., San Jose Foyer, La Cantera Ballroom 1) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is wheelchair accessible */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the location (e.g., theater, classroom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the speaker is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's profile image */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the speaker is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the speaker */,
  "session_role" TEXT /* Role in the session (e.g., speaker, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speakers_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the conference */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the attendee is affiliated with */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the attendee's profile image */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Areas of interest of the attendee */,
  "is_speaker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendee is also a speaker */,
  "is_volunteer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendee is a volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being registered for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee registering for the session */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Time when the attendee registered for the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendee attended the session */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the attendee after the session */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
